text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hm... The essential oils I used last night were
stronger than I thought.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Is the scent lingering in my hair or something? Is
that why people keep looking at me?

text_block_list.name: Dober's Friend
text_block_list.text:
You smell different today. Did you use a new oil
or something?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Ugh... I knew it. The scent's gotten into my hair!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober is so self-conscious about the smell
that she goes off to train alone, but she does
poorly due to how distracted she is.
